ANOTHER AI leak??

Apparently, GPT-Image-2 has been leaked on Arena AI, and while I can't confirm if it's the real deal, the output is pretty impressive.

To stay up-to-date on all the AI news, check out my weekly videos on YouTube (linked here).

result.title: Is Claude Mythos A Scam?
result.description:
Is all this Claude Mythos stuff just a big marketing ploy?

Here are my thoughts, but leave a comment with what you think 🤔

#AI #AInews #Claude #Mythos #anthropic

result.title: Claude Mythos Explained
result.description:
This is the biggest AI story this week BY FAR.

Anthropic just revealed "Claude Mythos", a model so powerful and so good at hacking that they’ve decided it’s too dangerous to release to the public.

Because of the unprecedented potential of this model, Anthropic is keeping it under lock and key, only granting access to a few elite security teams via "Project Glasswing."

Is this the end of software security as we know it, or the beginning of a new AI-driven defense era? 

To stay up-to-date with all the AI news, check out my weekly AI news videos on my channel! 

#Mythos #Anthropic #AI #CyberSecurity #AInews

result.title: This Unknown AI Model is Shockingly Good
result.description:
🚨 New model alert!

American company Arcee just dropped Trinity-Large-Thinking, a powerful open-source frontier reasoning model under the Apache 2.0 license. 

It’s already holding its own against the big names in benchmarks and showing impressive skills from agentic work to coding to building games.

If you want to stay up-to-date with ALL the new AI product releases and updates, check out my channel where I post videos every week. 

#AI #OpenSource #TechNews #FutureOfAI #AInews
